category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Hoedown as a Markdown parser/library in C.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Hoedown.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/hoedown/hoedown; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README says Hoedown processes Markdown and includes hoedown/smartypants command-line tools.
